testcase.name: test_get_latest_podcast_season
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_get_latest_podcast_season(): podcast_id = "kongerekka"
metadata = await psapi.get_podcast_metadata(podcast_id) latest_season = metadata["_links"]["seasons"][0]["name"]
> assert latest_season == "2023" E AssertionError: assert '1' == '2023' E E - 2023 E + 1
common/test_psapi.py:80: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()

testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_get_podcast_episodes_by_season(): podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
episodes = await psapi.get_podcast_episodes(podcast_id, season_id)
> assert len(episodes) == 10 E TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()
common/test_psapi.py:89: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_podcast
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_get_podcast(): feeds_dir = "tests/rss" os.makedirs(feeds_dir, exist_ok=True)
podcast_id = "kongerekka" season_id = "2020"
podcast = await get_podcast(podcast_id, season_id, feeds_dir, 10) > assert podcast E assert None
test_generate_feeds.py:15: AssertionError
